Aberration Empathy.name: 异怪共情 Aberration Empathy
Aberration Empathy.description:
由于你腐化的灵魂，你与异怪之间存在某种亲缘关系，使你能更轻易地影响它们。你可以使用交涉对异怪进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{留下印象} 并提出请求，即使该异怪无心智、你们不共享语言，或其心态过于异质以至于他人难以与其沟通。你在此类检定上获得+1环境加值。此外，每当你在非敌对情境中遇到一只异怪时，你可以立刻尝试一次交涉检定对该生物留下印象，而不必进行1分钟的交谈。你在该检定上承受–5减值。若你失败但能够进行1分钟的交谈，你可以在该时间结束时再尝试一次新的检定，而不必接受失败或大成功或大失败的结果。

特殊 若你拥有 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{熟面孔} 技能专长，且目标为异怪，则你进行立刻的交涉检定时不承受该减值。

Due to your corrupted soul, you have a kinship with aberrations, allowing you to influence them more easily. You can use Diplomacy to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{Make an Impression} on aberrations and make Requests even if the aberration is mindless, if you don't share a language, or if their mindset is so alien that it's difficult for others to communicate with them. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on such checks. In addition, whenever you meet an aberration in a non-hostile situation, you can immediately attempt a Diplomacy check to Make an Impression on that creature rather than needing to converse for 1 minute. You take a –5 penalty to the check. If you fail but can engage in 1 minute of conversation, you can attempt a new check at the end of that time rather than accepting the failure or critical failure result.

Special If you have the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand} skill feat, you don't take the penalty on your immediate Diplomacy check if the target is an aberration.

Sense Aberration.name: 感官 异怪 Sense Aberration
Sense Aberration.description:
当附近有其他畸变体时，你心智与灵魂中的瘙痒感会变得更加强烈，使你始终能够感知到它们的存在，即使无法得知其确切位置。当处于畸变体的存在之中时，你最终会侦测到它的存在。这视为一种朦胧感官，类似于人类的嗅觉感官。一只畸变体若使用伪装或以其他方式试图兽皮其存在，会进行一次欺瞒或隐匿检定，对抗你的察觉DC以从你那里兽皮自己。若该生物成功，则它对你的畸变体感官会暂时免疫1天。

The itching feeling in your mind and soul grows even stronger when other aberrations are nearby, allowing you to sense their presence at all times, if not their exact positions. When in the presence of an aberration, you eventually detect its presence. This acts as a vague sense, similar to humans' sense of smell. An aberration using a disguise or otherwise trying to hide its presence attempts a Deception or Stealth check against your Perception DC to hide from you. If the creature succeeds, it is then temporarily immune to your Sense Aberration for 1 day.

Big Stretch.name: 大伸展 Big Stretch
Big Stretch.description:
你的触手能延伸得比其他异怪灵魂更远得多。当你使用延展打击时，你的触及增加到120英尺，而不是30英尺。

Your tentacle can extend far longer than even other aberrant souls. When you use Stretching Strike, your reach increases to 120 feet instead of 30 feet.

Aberrant Soul Dedication.name: 畸变灵魂奉献 Aberrant Soul Dedication
Aberrant Soul Dedication.description:
因意外或出于本意，你正缓慢地变形为一只异怪。除你原本拥有的其他特征外，你获得异怪（特征）。你获得一项能力：以单动作将你的一只手臂变形为橡胶般的触手并可再变回原状，该动作具有专注（特征）。当你的一只手臂为触手时，它可以如常握持物体，但你也可以用其进行一次触手徒手攻击，该攻击造成1d6钝击伤害，且具有灵活、灵巧与擒抱特性。最后，你部分异怪化的本质使你逐渐适应外来的异怪，尽管它也威胁要从内部永久改变你；同时，你的心智中会以一种奇异的瘙痒感向你示警其他异怪的移动。这使你在对抗异怪的察觉检定与豁免中获得+1环境加值。

特殊 在你从@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-monster-parts.JournalEntry.mfCSSmUZaUtL745E]{异怪灵魂变体}中获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。此外，一旦你获得那两个专长，变形会进一步推进，你会失去你的其他族裔的另一项生物类型特征（通常为类人），从而完全变形为异怪。

Through accident or intent, you are slowly transforming into an aberration. You gain the aberration trait, in addition to your other traits. You gain the ability to transform one of your arms into a rubbery tentacle and back as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While one of your arms is a tentacle, it can hold objects normally, but you can also use it to make a tentacle unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the agile, finesse, and grapple traits. Lastly, your partially aberrant nature inures you to external aberrations, even as it threatens to change you permanently from the inside, while alerting you through a strange itch in your mind to other aberrations' movements. This grants you a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks and saving throws against aberrations.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-monster-parts.JournalEntry.mfCSSmUZaUtL745E]{Aberrant Soul Archetype}. Additionally, once you gain those two feats, the transformation progresses further, and you lose your other ancestry's other creature type trait (typically humanoid), fully transforming into an aberration.

Aberrant Anatomy.name: 畸变解剖学 Aberrant Anatomy
Aberrant Anatomy.description:
你可以将身体进一步变形为更加异怪的构造，长出古怪的冗余部位、令人困惑的要害器官，并且到处都是过量的酸液。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.ancestryfeatures.mEDTJi7d1bTEiwUD]{非凡解剖}术士血脉法术，以及一个包含1点聚能点的聚能池；你可以通过专注于调整你怪异的异怪解剖与灵魂来再聚能，或是将这股力量控制住，或是任其失控，取决于你的性格与处境。若你已拥有聚能池，则将你的聚能点数量增加1点。

You can transform your body into an even more aberrant configuration with bizarre redundant parts, confusing vitals, and way too much acid everywhere. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.ancestryfeatures.mEDTJi7d1bTEiwUD]{Unusual Anatomy} sorcerer bloodline spell and a focus pool of 1 Focus Point; you can refocus by concentrating on adjusting your bizarre aberrant anatomy and soul, either keeping the power under control or allowing it to run loose, depending on your personality and situation. If you already have a focus pool, increase your number of Focus Points by 1.

Extend Tentacle.name: 延伸触手 Extend Tentacle
Extend Tentacle.description:
你可以让你的触手变得异常地长，使你能够用它在触及范围内攻击对手，但不能用它做其他任何事。直到你再次使用“延展触手”切换回去，或将你的触手变回正常手臂为止，你的触手徒手攻击获得触及特性，通常使其拥有10英尺的触及，但你不能用触手进行交互、握持物体或执行其他动作。

You can make your tentacle unnaturally long, allowing you to attack opponents with it from reach but not use it for anything else. Until you use Extend Tentacle again to switch back or change your tentacle back into a normal arm, your tentacle unarmed attack gains the reach trait, typically granting it a reach of 10 feet, but you can't use the tentacle to Interact, hold an object, or perform other actions.

Monster Scavenger.name: 怪物拾荒者 Monster Scavenger
Monster Scavenger.description:
你特别擅长利用你击败的生物身上的每一部分。你可以使用生存来 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Earn Income]{Earn Income}，以搜集怪物部件来赚取收入。如果你选择改用合适的学识（技能），你在该检定上获得+1环境加值。如果你在生存上是大师，该加值提高为+2环境加值。

You are particularly adept at using every part of the creatures you defeat. You can use Survival to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Earn Income]{Earn Income} scavenging monster parts. If you choose to use an appropriate Lore skill instead, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the check. The bonus increase to a +2 circumstance bonus if you're a master in Survival.

Aberrant Grab.name: 异怪擒抱 Aberrant Grab
Aberrant Grab.description:
需求 你的上一个动作是一次成功的触手打击。

你用触手抓住你击中的敌人。你击中的敌人变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{受擒}，如同你在一次运动检定中成功对该敌人使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{擒抱}。

特殊 你可以在延展打击后使用畸变抓握，尽管通常情况下由于该生物在你的触及之外，受擒状态会结束。若你如此做，进行一次运动检定，对抗该生物的强韧DC。成功时，你将该生物拉拽直到其在你的触及之内，并且其仍保持受擒；失败时，受擒状态结束。

Requirements Your last action was a successful tentacle Strike.

You grab the enemy you hit in your tentacle. The foe you hit becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}, as if you had succeeded at an Athletics check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} the foe.

Special You can use Aberrant Grab after Stretching Strike, even though the grabbed condition would normally end due to the creature being out of your reach. If you do, attempt an Athletics check against the creature's Fortitude DC. On a success, you pull the creature until it's within your reach and it remains grabbed; on a failure, the grabbed condition ends.

Aberrant Constrict.name: 畸变缠勒 Aberrant Constrict
Aberrant Constrict.description:
需求 你用触手使一名敌人陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}。

你将触手紧紧缠绕在敌人身上，在你的擒抱中碾碎他们。敌人受到等同于你的 [[/r (@actor.level+@actor.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]]{等级 + 你的力量调整值} 的钝击伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，使用你的职业DC或法术DC（以较高者为准）。

Requirements You have a foe @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} with your tentacle.

You squeeze your tentacle tightly around your foe, crushing them in your grasp. The foe takes bludgoeoning damage equal to your [[/r (@actor.level+@actor.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]]{level + your Strength modifier}, with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save, using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Stretching Strike.name: 伸展打击 Stretching Strike
Stretching Strike.description:
你在短暂的一瞬间将更多的手臂、肩膀和躯干变形为异怪，将你的触手伸展到极远的距离以进行攻击。进行一次触及为30尺的触手打击。

You transform more and more of your arm, shoulder, and torso into an aberration for a brief moment, stretching your tentacle out to a great distance to attack. Make a tentacle Strike with a reach of 30 feet.
